name: Taco Bell Drive-Thru on University
content: Normally I would not add a chain restaurant to this list, but this specific Taco Bell location is one of the only places open 24 hours in Huntsville, after the Waffle Houses started closing early For the non-Americans, a Waffle House not being open 24 hours a day no matter what is happening shouldn’t be possible at all, but apparently fights got so bad that they had to start closing the diners late at night. I do not want to know what levels of vile and wretchery were needed to happen for not one, but two Waffle Houses to start closing their doors at night.. Because of this, the drive-thru line can get very long. Two of my friends went on a date where they got in the Taco Bell line, started watching Shrek in their car, and got to the ordering kiosk only after the credits had finished rolling.
